title: Faithful: PAEBloom param-response diverges from headless FCP (worst ddb 7.0 dB)
goal: FAITHFUL-REIMPL (ROADMAP Rule 13): the TS engine impl of PAEBloom must match REAL headless FCP across its ENTIRE parameter space, not just values the 65 fixed transitions use. The DELTA oracle (fct/faithful) set each continuous param of PAEBloom to range extremes across hosts ['Lights__Bloom'] and compared how the oracle vs the engine RESPOND: ddb=PSNR(oracle(theta)-oracle(theta0), engine(theta)-engine(theta0)). worst ddb=7.00 < pass 40 means the engine responds WRONGLY to a real parameter change (a faithful engine scores ~99 dB; the identity/noise floor is 99). Fix the PAEBloom implementation so its parameter response matches FCP. NO scene-signature dispatch, NO env flags (Rule 12/13): behavior = f(filter params) only. Re-verify: `python3 -m fct.faithful.driver sweep PAEBloom` must reach >= pass_db worst-ddb across all hosts. Worst diverging (host/param/theta -> ddb): [{"host": "Lights__Bloom", "param": "brightness", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 114.039, "ddb": 6.997}, {"host": "Lights__Bloom", "param": "cliptowhite", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 64.293, "ddb": 11.968}, {"host": "Lights__Bloom", "param": "mix", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 42.459, "ddb": 15.571}, {"host": "Lights__Bloom", "param": "amount", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 42.459, "ddb": 15.581}, {"host": "Lights__Bloom", "param": "mix", "theta": 0.5, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 17.971, "ddb": 23.039}, {"host": "Lights__Bloom", "param": "vertical", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 10.471, "ddb": 27.731}]
